posts.title: Android多语言
posts.text: 一、添加多语言资源在Values下二、更新Configuration中的locale属性1234567//更改语言 返回主Activity即IsOpenLocationActivityResources resources = LanguageActivity.this.getResources();DisplayMetrics dm = resources.getDisplayMetrics();Configuration config = resources.getConfiguration();// 应用用户选择语言config.locale = UtilTool.getLanguage();resources.updateConfiguration(config, dm); 三、重启Activity123Intent intent = new Intent(LanguageActivity.this, IsOpenLocationActivity.class);intent.setFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK | Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TASK);startActivity(intent); 四、持久化存储12345Resources resources = mContext.getResources();DisplayMetrics dm = resources.getDisplayMetrics();Configuration config = resources.getConfiguration();config.locale = UtilTool.getLanguage();resources.updateConfiguration(config, dm);
